title: End the Frozen App
ticket: Grandma says her screen is 'stuck forever'.
tooltip: Task Manager can force close apps.

interactiveDemo.prompt: What if an app stops responding?
options: Force close it in Task Manager
interactiveDemo.hint: Use the built-in task tool to end it safely.

repeatTask: Force close a second frozen app.
breakFixTask: Task Manager won't open. Use Ctrl+Shift+Esc.
explainQuestions: When should you NOT force close?
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without hints?

translationTerms.why: You may need to force close it.
